name: Workspace Scout
description: Local-first workspace introspection engine. Snapshots the file tree, detects the JS/TS/Bun/Node stack, inspects git state, and audits package.json dependencies — all without leaving the repo.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Check that the WorkspaceScout engine is installed and ready.

tools.name: snapshot
tools.description: Full workspace snapshot: file tree, git status, stack detection, and package.json summary in one call.

workspace.description: Absolute path to the workspace root to snapshot.

depth.description: Max directory depth for the file tree scan. Defaults to 3.

tools.name: git_status
tools.description: Return the current branch, dirty files, and recent commits for a workspace.

workspace.description: Absolute path to the workspace root.

tools.name: stack_detect
tools.description: Detect the technology stack in a workspace (Bun, Node, TypeScript, React, Vite, Next, Python, Ruby, Go, Rust).

workspace.description: Absolute path to the workspace root to inspect.

tools.name: deps_check
tools.description: Parse package.json and report dependency counts, available scripts, lockfile presence, and outdated packages.

workspace.description: Absolute path to the workspace root containing package.json.
